title: ziziphora eglandulosa
intro: Ziziphora eglandulosa, also known as Mexican oregano or Persian chamomile, is an herbaceous plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ziziphora eglandulosa include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Ziziphora eglandulosa include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
